title: Materialize TimelineMomentModel records for all forward-referenced Sparks in 2026-05-17 wrkstrm-doctrine + paulgraham + venture-capital vaults
description:
Substrate doctrine ontology debt. The wrkstrm-doctrine + paulgraham + venture-capital vaults committed 2026-05-17 contain many Concepts whose sR (sourceSparkRefs) fields point at forward-typed slugs (e.g., spark-rismay-arm-the-fluff-directive, spark-rismay-vash-bastards-peace-love, spark-rismay-googlers-text-transformers-test-harness-as-database, etc.) that don't have materialized TimelineMomentModel records yet. 

Pattern: per the canonical fixture at schema-universal/.../ideation-schemas/v0.1.0/fixtures/canonical.exploration-this-thread.json, Sparks are TimelineMomentModel records with fields t (title), s (tags array), tg (target LinkRef array). Substrate-canonical home is vaults/session-corpora/<harness-or-agent>/.

Concrete materialization: 
1. Create vaults/session-corpora/claude/ if it doesn't exist (substrate doctrine: session-corpora vaults are per-agent + per-session).
2. For each forward-referenced spark slug in 2026-05-17's typed Concepts, write a TimelineMomentModel record with the operator quote that spawned it + correct chrononID + tags + cross-vault LinkRef back to the Concept it was Spark for.
3. Run schema-lab validation: every Concept's sR LinkRefs should resolve to materialized TimelineMomentModel records (TRUE per three-valued logic; UNKNOWN means a Spark is still forward-referenced).

Approximate Spark count: 25+ forward-references across all three vaults seeded 2026-05-17. Substantial but mechanical work — can be done by a single agent in one session.

Closure: schema-lab validation reports zero UNKNOWN sR references for the 2026-05-17 vault contents; chronicle entry updated; receipt written.
